entry.title: New: CR 24-112 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-171, CD1, to refer to the planning commissions a proposed bill to allow mobile food trucks or trailers of 1,000 square feet or less as permitted accessory uses on farms in the Agricultural District.

Agriculture, Diversification, Environment, and Public Transportation Committee

View on the council site
